title: pyrus helenae
intro: Pyrus helenae, also known as Helen's pear or Chinese pear, is a species of pear tree that is native to China. The bark, leaves, and roots of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus helenae include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and indigestion. Pyrus helenae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in decoctions and poultices for topical applications.
